name: Sour Cream-Ginger Cookies.
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine oil, brown sugar, molasses, egg, and sour cream in a mixer bowl. Mix at medium speed until well blended.
2. In a separate bowl, stir together flour, ginger, cinnamon, cloves, salt, and baking soda until evenly mixed.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the sour cream mixture. Mix at medium speed until creamy.
4. Drop dough by 1 1/2 tablespoonfuls onto cookie sheets that have been sprayed with pan spray or lined with aluminum foil.
5. Bake at 375°F for about 10 minutes, or until cookies are firm and lightly browned.
6. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack to room temperature.
Food exchange serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
Calories: 92, FAT: 4g, CHO: 15g, Na: 90mg, PRO: 1g, Cholesterol: 14mg. Source: Desserts for Diabetics by Mabel Cavaiani, R.D.
